title: Dhammika Perera to be sworn as MP tomorrow
body_lines: Business tycoon Dhammika Perera is to be sworn as a member of parliament before Speaker Mahinda Yapa Abeywardana,Parliament sources said today.
Sergeant-at-arms Narendra Fernando told the Daily Mirror that they have been advised to make arrangements for the swearing in ceremony of Mr. Perera today.
“He is expected to be sworn in at 10:00 am today,” Mr.Fernando said.
He will be coming in as a national list MP in place of former Minister of Finance Basil Rajapaksa who resigned from Parliament recently.
Mr, Perera is also expected to be given the ministerial portfolio of Investment Promotion. (Yohan Perera)
